title: Per-Secondly Features
description: Per-second structured feature vector extracted from video analysis.

t.description: Timestamp in seconds from video beginning

motion_energy_near_player.description: Motion energy in near player zone [0, 1]

motion_energy_far_player.description: Motion energy in far player zone [0, 1]

foreground_area.description: Fraction of frame with significant motion [0, 1]

motion_peak.description: Whether this second contains a motion peak (potential hit)

player_near_count.description: Number of near players detected (0, 1, or 2)

audio_hit_peak.description: Whether audio contains a hit-like sound
